mainEntity.name: Difference Utah vs Idaho workers comp for work slips?
mainEntity.text: Difference Utah vs Idaho workers comp for work slips?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah caps TTD at $824/wk 312 wks Idaho $1,086/wk 52 wks temp both no-fault but Utah easier reporting.[6][1]

suggestedAnswer.text: Idaho stricter notice 60 days Utah 180. Both employer-funded. Attorneys note Idaho higher max but shorter duration. Jurisdiction matters for cross-border work. Consult local for specifics.[6][1]

name: Utah vs Idaho Comp for Workplace Slips
description: Utah caps TTD at $824/wk 312 wks Idaho $1,086/wk 52 wks temp both no-fault but Utah easier reporting.[6][1]
